metricsInfo.title: How Metrics Work

rating.title: Rating
rating.desc: Average of all citizen feedback ratings (1-5 stars) on your resolved complaints. Updated when citizens submit feedback after resolution.

avgTime.title: Average Time
avgTime.desc: Running average of hours taken from assignment to resolution. Calculated as: (previous avg x completions + new time) / (completions + 1). Updated on every HOD approval.

streak.title: Streak
streak.desc: Consecutive days with at least 1 completion. Counts backwards from today with a 1-day grace period. Resets if you miss 2+ days. Maintain 7+ days to earn the Consistent Performer badge!

totalCompleted.title: Total Completed
totalCompleted.desc: Lifetime count of all resolved complaints. This never decreases - it's your career achievement counter. Incremented on every HOD approval.

metricsInfo.tip: Tip: All metrics are calculated in real-time when the leaderboard loads!
